TEMPERATURE  
THE FIRST WORD OF MY RESPONSE SHOULD BE THE WORD TEMPERATURE. IN MY RESPONSE THE LETTER S SHOULD APPEAR AT LEAST 13 TIMES. YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS. INCLUDE KEYWORD ROLL IN THE 12-TH SENTENCE, AS THE 2-TH WORD OF THAT SENTENCE.
